title: If you regularly dig through logs or trace issues across different sources, I'd love to know what your current process looks like, what tools you use, what work
idea: Difficulty in tracing issues across multiple data sources and logs, leading to manual and time-consuming processes.
elevator_pitch: Automate log tracing and issue resolution across multiple data sources, saving time and increasing efficiency.
target_user: DevOps engineers, developers, and IT professionals who regularly work with logs and multiple data sources.
why_now: The increasing complexity of modern software systems and the growing need for efficient issue resolution make this problem more pressing than ever.
